header.name: Meysam Soheilipour
header.address: Remote USA, Based in Mexico City (US Citizen)

summary.value: Growth marketing and product management executive with 10+ years of experience driving digital transformation and revenue growth across travel tech, media, and e-commerce—including B2B SaaS and enterprise software GTM contexts. Skilled at pressure-testing acquisition and retention hypotheses, shaping messaging and content architecture for technical and economic buyers, and applying AI-augmented content operations to shorten time-to-market for GTM assets. Adept at comprehensive market analysis, multi-touch attribution and incrementality testing, and leveraging automation, Python coding, and financial modeling to optimize performance, scale operations, and foster cross-functional collaboration. Proven track record managing high-performance teams and executing innovative digital campaigns—from SEO/SEM and ABM to product-led growth initiatives—that consistently deliver measurable results. Analytical, data-driven, and solutions-focused leader with hybrid skill sets, passionate about integrating emerging technologies with business development strategies to enhance customer engagement and market competitiveness in remote, global environments.

value: Product & growth leadership (marketplaces, travel tech, PLG, B2B SaaS GTM)
ABM, demand generation & lifecycle marketing; partnership & affiliate programs
Data-driven strategy: attribution, incrementality & A/B testing, financial modeling
Strategic messaging & content architecture for technical and economic buyers
AI-augmented GTM & content ops: prompt engineering, conversational AI, automation
Digital acquisition: SEO/SEM, paid media, GA4, Salesforce/Pardot & ad platforms
Analytics & visualization: Looker, Tableau, BigQuery, cohort & funnel analysis
Cross-functional leadership; creator ecosystems & competitive intelligence
Technical program delivery (platform scale, migrations, cloud, APIs)
Stakeholder alignment, hiring, editorial mentorship & distributed operations

footnote.value: AI-assisted development & code review (Cursor / LLM workflows).

items: Technical SEO & Core Web Vitals (caching, CDN)
LLM applications (Vertex AI, AWS Bedrock, NVIDIA NeMo); vector search (Pinecone, Qdrant); agent workflows
Answer Engine Optimization (AEO); conversational AI implementation; prompt engineering for content operations
GA4 Analytics; Google Tag Manager; Search Console; Google Ads; Facebook Ads
Local Services Ads (LSAs); display & traditional media advertising

professionalExperience.title: Head of Product & Growth | AI-Driven Marketing & Automation

description.value:
Founded in 2018 as ChinaWayz.com and later consolidated under the Trip Ways brand; resumed full-time leadership after Red Ventures to scale the marketplace globally, including market research and partnership strategies to expand reach and supply.

Owns product and growth execution for a global two-sided travel marketplace with 900 vendor companies, 15,000 complex bookable products, 5,000 travelers, and a distributed team of 20 employees.

Built and scaled a platform that enables local tour companies to list and manage services at no upfront cost, improving supply quality, traveler access to authentic and affordable experiences, and marketplace transaction efficiency.

Developed and launched a high-performance cloud-based WordPress platform tailored to multi-vendor travel commerce, integrating real-time booking, automated workflows, and growth-focused digital marketing strategies.

Led a large-scale replatform and content migration while preserving marketplace continuity and strengthening search, catalog discoverability, and long-term scalability.

Built and scaled automation workflows for inventory publishing and lifecycle operations; implemented funnel modeling and optimization to drive continuous revenue growth, reducing manual overhead, improving operational reliability, and accelerating go-to-market for new tours and updates.

Integrated website personalization features to boost user activation and conversion rates.

Implemented AI-powered semantic discovery and recommendation capabilities to improve natural-language search and tour relevance across live inventory.

Managed global affiliate programs and strategic travel partnerships with Viator, TourRadar, Travelzoo, and similar partners to execute growth initiatives, track performance, and optimize outcomes across organic and paid channels.

Directed cross-functional execution across 20 internal team members and global vendor partners in 70 countries, while hiring and managing distributed support operations to deliver 24/7 customer coverage.

professionalExperience.title: Sr. Growth Marketing – Audience and SEO

description.value:
Drove growth strategy for CNET's Media & Commerce business across Google, YouTube, Amazon, and CNET.com—including enterprise-level paid media and ABM-style initiatives—partnering with leadership, product, engineering, data, editorial, commerce, and video teams to improve audience and revenue performance.

Collaborated across teams to improve user experience for videos and affiliate widgets and strengthen engagement and revenue measurement; led testing initiatives that lifted on-page conversions by 1% and, through incrementality testing and partnership optimization, improved affiliate partnership ROI by 7%.

Planned and managed performance for major shopping events, including Prime Day and Black Friday, by defining best-in-class strategies, content recommendations, deals lineups, and campaign optimization that drove $1.5M in incremental revenue across brands.

Developed and managed end-to-end data pipelines, reporting, and interactive Looker dashboards that improved real-time visibility into media and commerce KPIs and informed editorial planning, content investment decisions, and growth prioritization.

Led cross-functional video optimization strategy across platforms, increasing video traffic and revenue by 15%; authored the CNET video SEO playbook and led strategy sessions to operationalize best practices across global teams.

Leveraged Pardot and Salesforce for targeted audience engagement and revenue measurement alongside broader marketing operations.

Developed AI solutions and workflow integrations to streamline data analysis and forecasting, SEO execution, content creation, and video production optimization.

Managed day-to-day operations of the Amazon publishing program, including content and SEO optimization, resulting in 600% revenue growth within 6 months.

professionalExperience.title: Co-Founder / Business Developer / Technical Project Manager

description.value:
Co-founded and scaled an e-commerce company from the ground up, building and managing a 50-person organization.

Designed and developed an online platform with approximately 55,000 resources (articles, podcasts, forums, and Farsi-language content) across 800+ categories, reaching approximately 10M monthly visitors and ranking 999 globally (20 in Iran) within 3 years.

Led content strategy and SEO execution that elevated the site to the top 80 websites in Iran and top 2,000 globally, with 15M+ monthly sessions and 80% organic traffic.

Managed full-funnel digital marketing using Salesforce, ABM frameworks, and LinkedIn Advertising, integrated with SEO/SEM, lifecycle tactics, and monetization.

Hired and mentored a team of content managers, SEO specialists, and copywriters, improving workflow efficiency and execution quality.

Utilized GA4 and Google Analytics for advanced performance reporting, funnel analysis, and campaign optimization.

Implemented conversion rate optimization (CRO) tests to improve site-wide transaction efficiency.

Established cross-functional operating guidelines for marketing strategy, keyword research, copywriting, content optimization, SEO/SEM, and monetization.

Drove continuous system improvements in a constrained infrastructure environment, increasing operational resilience and team productivity.

Led a large-scale migration from a legacy CMS to WordPress on self-managed AWS infrastructure, improving site performance and user experience while reducing server costs by 40%.

Performed comprehensive quality assurance testing for semiconductor manufacturing equipment and software systems, ensuring compliance with industry standards and customer requirements.

Executed detailed test plans for complex hardware and software components, documented defects, and partnered with engineering teams to resolve issues efficiently.

Validated product functionality, performance, and reliability across multiple product lines and customer environments using advanced testing methods and tools.

Contributed to continuous improvement initiatives by analyzing test processes, identifying optimization opportunities, and implementing best practices that improved product quality and reduced time-to-market.

Collaborated with R&D, manufacturing, and customer support teams to support successful product delivery and customer satisfaction.

Maintained detailed documentation of test results, procedures, and equipment specifications to support regulatory compliance and knowledge transfer.

professionalExperience.title: Digital Marketing Manager / CRM Project Manager

description.value:
Led digital marketing and CRM initiatives for a growing travel agency, driving customer acquisition and retention through multi-channel campaigns.

Developed and executed integrated campaigns across SEO, SEM, social media, and email, resulting in a 40% increase in online bookings and a 25% improvement in customer engagement.

Implemented and managed CRM systems to streamline customer data management, automate marketing workflows, and improve service delivery.

Analyzed customer behavior and market trends to optimize budget allocation, identify high-value segments, and launch targeted campaigns that increased conversion rates by 30%.

Partnered with travel consultants and operations teams to deliver a seamless customer experience from inquiry through post-travel follow-up.

Managed marketing budgets and vendor relationships, negotiating with advertising platforms and service providers to improve campaign ROI.

Created travel content and promotional assets across digital channels to strengthen brand visibility and audience engagement.

professionalExperience.title: Jr. Digital Marketer / SEO Specialist / Copywriter

description.value:
Executed digital marketing campaigns and SEO strategies for diverse client portfolios, improving online visibility and lead generation across multiple industries.

Conducted keyword research, competitive analysis, and technical SEO audits that drove an average 60% improvement in organic rankings for client websites.

Created copy for websites, blogs, email campaigns, and social media while maintaining brand voice and improving engagement and conversion performance.

Managed Google Ads and social media advertising programs, optimizing targeting and creative to improve customer acquisition efficiency and ROI.

Analyzed website performance with Google Analytics and related tools, delivering actionable recommendations for ongoing campaign optimization.

Collaborated with design and development teams to embed SEO best practices into website builds and optimization projects.

Supported senior marketing leaders with client presentations, strategy development, and campaign reporting.

Stayed current on industry trends and algorithm updates, adapting strategies to sustain client performance.

value.degree: Master of Business Management; Minor in Marketing
